name: SEON Fraud Prevention API
what_it_does: SEON fraud prevention platform REST API for fintechs, gaming companies, e-commerce platforms, and financial institutions to assess fraud risk through digital footprint analysis, email intelligence, phone analysis, and device fingerprinting. Enables AI agents to manage email address reputation and social media presence analysis for account fraud detection automation, handle phone number intelligence and carrier lookup for identity verification automation, access device fingerprinting and browser analysis for account takeover prevention automation, retrieve IP geolocation and proxy/VPN detection for geographic risk assessment automation, manage user behavioral scoring and risk profile aggregation for composite fraud risk automation, handle batch transaction scoring for fraud detection at scale automation, access KYC lite verification workflow for frictionless onboarding automation, retrieve whitelist/blacklist and custom rule management for fraud policy enforcement automation, manage fraud investigation and case review workflow for fraud operations automation, and integrate SEON with payment processors, identity platforms, and customer onboarding systems for end-to-end fraud prevention.
use_cases: Scoring new accounts from digital footprint fraud detection agents
Detecting proxies from IP intelligence automation agents
Validating email from identity verification automation agents
Preventing account takeover from device intelligence agents
not_for: Full KYC document verification (use Jumio or Onfido)
AML transaction monitoring and SAR filing (use Unit21 or Sardine)
Sanctions and PEP screening (use ComplyAdvantage or LexisNexis Risk)
best_when: A fintech, gaming company, e-commerce platform, or financial institution wanting AI agents to automate account fraud detection using email intelligence, digital footprint analysis, device fingerprinting, and IP reputation scoring within SEON's real-time fraud prevention platform.
avoid_when: SOCIAL MEDIA DATA SCRAPING AND PLATFORM TERMS OF SERVICE: SEON social media analysis uses public profile data; social media platform terms of service restrict automated scraping; SEON's social enrichment data is obtained through approved data partnerships; automated use of SEON social signals must not supplement with additional social media scraping that violates platform ToS. GDPR LEGITIMATE INTEREST FOR FRAUD PREVENTION DATA: SEON processes personal data (email, phone, device) for fraud prevention; GDPR Article 6(1)(f) legitimate interest basis applies for fraud prevention; automated fraud scoring must document legitimate interest assessment; automated SEON integration without GDPR Article 6 basis documentation creates GDPR compliance gap. EMAIL AND PHONE INTELLIGENCE ACCURACY FOR HIGH-STAKES DECISIONS: SEON email and phone signals are probabilistic indicators, not definitive identity verification; automated rejection of account applications based solely on SEON risk score without human review creates potential discrimination against legitimate users with thin digital footprint; implement human review for borderline risk scores to avoid over-reliance on probabilistic indicators.

auth.notes: SEON uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON and official SDKs. Budapest, Hungary HQ (with London office). Founded 2017 by Tamas Kadar and Bence Jendruszak. Private (~$94M raised, IVP, PortfoLion, Creandum). Email intelligence, phone intelligence, IP analysis, device fingerprinting. 5,000+ clients across 180 countries. Free trial with 200 API calls. No-code admin console. Competes with Sardine, Sift, and Emailage (LexisNexis) for digital footprint fraud prevention.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial with 200 API calls; production access requires paid subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-as-you-go per API call; volume subscription tiers for high frequency; Enterprise plan with SLA
pricing.notes: Budapest Hungary. Private (~$94M raised). Pay-as-you-go or volume subscription. Free trial 200 calls. Enterprise SLA tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; configurable per tier; no webhooks — polling-based for batch

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — ALL FRAUD SCORING IS SYNCHRONOUS REQUEST-RESPONSE: SEON fraud API is request-response only; automated fraud prevention workflows must call SEON synchronously in the transaction/account creation path; automated batch scoring via SEON is available but real-time prevention requires synchronous integration; automated async batch scoring cannot provide real-time fraud prevention for payment authorization workflows

DIGITAL FOOTPRINT AVAILABILITY VARIES BY GEOGRAPHY AND DEMOGRAPHICS: SEON digital footprint signals (social media profiles, email age, online accounts) vary significantly by user demographics and geography; automated fraud scoring using SEON must account for legitimate users with thin digital footprint (elderly users, privacy-conscious users, emerging market users); low social footprint is not conclusive fraud signal; implement risk score segmentation by user demographic for accurate fraud threshold calibration

EMAIL DOMAIN AGE AND DISPOSABLE EMAIL DETECTION: SEON detects disposable and temporary email addresses; automated account creation blocking based on disposable email detection may block legitimate use cases (privacy relay services like Apple Hide My Email, corporate email aliases); calibrate disposable email blocking policy to allow privacy relay services used by legitimate customers

IP PROXY AND VPN DETECTION FALSE POSITIVES FOR CORPORATE USERS: SEON IP analysis flags proxy and VPN usage as elevated risk; corporate users accessing via corporate VPN and privacy-focused consumers using commercial VPN services will be flagged; automated transaction blocking based on VPN detection without risk-based escalation creates excessive friction for legitimate privacy-tool users

SDK INSTALLATION FOR DEVICE FINGERPRINT SIGNALS: Full SEON device intelligence requires SEON JavaScript SDK or mobile SDK in client application; automated SEON API calls without SDK integration miss device-level signals; API-only SEON integration provides IP and email intelligence but not device fingerprinting; implement SDK alongside API for complete fraud signal coverage
agent_readiness.security_notes: Fraud prevention. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. API key. EU/US. Email, phone, device, and IP intelligence data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Fraud prevention. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. API key. EU/US. Email, phone, device, and IP fraud intelligence.
